{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kesemano Shrine'''|計仙麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].
